33 Drew Kempel

33 Drew Kempel

  • Position:
    Guard
  • Height:
    6-4
  • Weight:
    190
  • Class:
    Freshman
  • Hometown:
    Bismarck, N.D.
  • Highschool:
    Bismarck Century HS
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career

Summary

Biography

Prior to MSU
Named 2nd Team North Dakota AA All-State as a senior. Led Bismarck Century to state title this past season. Named to Class AA All-WDA Team and the Class AA All-State Tournament Team as a junior. Academically he was named to the B Honor Roll and Sports Honor Roll.
No stats available for the current season.
